'''WED15-D3''' was a [[WED-15 Treadwell droid/Legends|WED-15 Treadwell]] for sale at [[Jawa Traders]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. Maltreatment by previous owners have left it very suspicious.<ref name="GG7" />
